_comment: Pa11y configuration for the ICCC accessibility check workflow.
chromeLaunchConfig sets --no-sandbox for GitHub Actions runner.
The ignore list below suppresses two pre-existing AAA failures that
were present on main before the setup build and are not regressions.
Both failures are formally recorded as deferred-backlog items in
to the accessibility phase) and in todo.md (Deferred backlog).
Hidden <input type=file id=file-input> lacks an accessible name.
Fix: add aria-label (or label association) in the accessibility phase.
--fg-muted on --bg is 6.98:1 in light mode (target 7:1); model-banner
text is 6.74:1. Fix: darken --fg-muted token in the accessibility phase.
REMOVE BOTH ENTRIES FROM THIS IGNORE ARRAY in the accessibility-phase
pull request once the underlying issues are fixed.
No Level A codes are suppressed here.
